scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @onkernel/cua-ai && npm run build --workspace @onkernel/cua-agent && tsc -b && npm run build --workspace @onkernel/cua-cli && npm run build --workspace @onkernel/cua-bench && npm run build:native --workspace @onkernel/ptywright --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @onkernel/cua-ai && npm run build --workspace @onkernel/cua-agent && tsc -b
